'''yafomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockside|dockside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockside|dockside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yafomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæfemeth|yæfemeth]] || [[word:yæfemej|yæfemej]] || [[word:yæfemesh|yæfemesh]] || [[word:yæfeme|yæfeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yafofomoth|yafofomoth]] || [[word:yafofomoj|yafofomoj]] || [[word:yafofomosh|yafofomosh]] || [[word:yafofomo|yafofomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yafomoth|yafomoth]] || [[word:yafomoj|yafomoj]] || [[word:yafomosh|yafomosh]] || [[word:yafomo|yafomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yafofmoth|yafofmoth]] || [[word:yafofmoj|yafofmoj]] || [[word:yafofmosh|yafofmosh]] || [[word:yafofmof|yafofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yafomotho|yafomotho]] || [[word:yafomojo|yafomojo]] || [[word:yafomosho|yafomosho]] || [[word:yafomoko|yafomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yafomoth|yafomoth]] || [[word:yafomoj|yafomoj]] || [[word:yafomosh|yafomosh]] || [[word:yafomo|yafomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yafomothol|yafomothol]] || [[word:yafomojol|yafomojol]] || [[word:yafomoshol|yafomoshol]] || [[word:yafomokol|yafomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yafomothotho|yafomothotho]] || [[word:yafomojojo|yafomojojo]] || [[word:yafomoshosho|yafomoshosho]] || [[word:yafomoko|yafomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yafomothon|yafomothon]] || [[word:yafomojon|yafomojon]] || [[word:yafomoshon|yafomoshon]] || [[word:yafomokon|yafomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yafomothoro|yafomothoro]] || [[word:yafomojoro|yafomojoro]] || [[word:yafomoshoro|yafomoshoro]] || [[word:yafomokoro|yafomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
